about.passion: I enjoy building projects that are clean, practical, and easy to use. I like improving layouts, solving coding problems, and turning class requirements into working applications.
about.approach: I focus on learning by building. My goal is to write clear code, follow project requirements carefully, and keep improving step by step with every assignment and project.
